text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 206 

ICL_AMT 

LABEL: Part D Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the dollar amount of Part D Initial Coverage Limit (ICL) applied by Part D plan. If no ICL 
is applied this field is blank. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: ICL_AMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The width of this value changed from 12 to 8 in 2009.
